summary: The input batch was processed through 8 scholarly protocols. Several words required splitting to separate attached conjunctions ('ና'), interrogative suffixes ('ስ'), or prepositions ('በ', 'ከ', 'ወደ'). For instance, 'ሐብቱንና' was split into 'ሐብቱን' and the conjunction 'ና', with 'ሐብቱን' being the cleaned word. Similarly, 'ብንሆንስ' yielded 'ብንሆን' and the interrogative 'ስ'. Prefixes like 'በ', 'ከ', and 'ወደ' were detached from words like 'በወይጦ', 'ከታዳጊዎቹም', and 'ወደታወቀችው' to isolate the core noun or verb. Two words were discarded: 'ቪዚን' was identified as a foreign word (likely 'Vision') not conforming to Amharic morphology, and 'በአዘርነት' was deemed unfixable gibberish or an obscure term not recognized as a standard Amharic word or root, especially with the 'ነት' suffix implying a state or quality that 'አዘር' does not typically form. All remaining words were lemmatized to their base forms, and appropriate parts of speech and synonyms were assigned. All included words met the minimum length requirement of two characters.

The input batch was processed through all 8 scholarly protocols. Several words containing the enclitic 'ና' (and) or 'ም' (also/even) were split according to PROTOCOL 1 (THE SPLITTER) to separate the base word from the enclitic. 'መላኺንና' was split into 'መላኺን' and 'እና', with 'መላኺን' lemmatized to 'መላክ' (king/ruler) based on common usage for plural forms. All words were successfully lemmatized to their infinitive or base noun/adjective forms (PROTOCOL 4), and comprehensive English synonyms were provided (PROTOCOL 5). Part of speech tagging was applied (PROTOCOL 6). No words were discarded due to gibberish or unfixable errors (PROTOCOL 2) or single-character length (PROTOCOL 7), except for the enclitics 'ም' and 'እና' which are valid single-character morphemes in Amharic and were included as per the splitting protocol. No visual OCR corrections were necessary (PROTOCOL 3).

    *   'እድሜአችሁ': Corrected to 'ዕድሜአችሁ' to reflect the proper spelling of 'ዕድሜ' (age).

    *   For nouns like 'በትርፋቸው', 'ቀጣናዎቻቸው', 'ትቢትሽ', 'ኩራትሽ', 'ተዋናይነቱን', the base noun forms were extracted (e.g., 'ትርፍ', 'ቀጣና', 'ትቢት', 'ኩራት', 'ተዋናይ').
